TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Smangus, title = Smangus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Smangus} }

S.FORM: == Smangus == i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Smangus. u kasalumaluma' nu Smangus sa, 38 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 176 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 173 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 85%, Amis 1%, Paiwan 2%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 10%. Smangus i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Smangus. u kasalumaluma' nu Smangus sa, 48 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 233 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 223 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 10 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 91%, SaySiyat 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: == smaŇčus == i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%. smaŇčus i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, sajsijat *%, zumazuma *%.
S.FORM: == Smangus == i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Smangus. u kasalumaluma' nu Smangus sa, 38 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 176 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 173 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 3 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 85%, Amis 1%, Paiwan 2%, Bunun 1%, zumazuma 10%. Smangus i Hsinchu a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Smangus. u kasalumaluma' nu Smangus sa, 48 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 233 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 223 ku tademaw, pakalatu 96%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 10 ku tademaw, pakalatu 4%. u kasabinacadan, Tayal 91%, SaySiyat 1%, zumazuma 3%.
S.PHON: == smaŇčus == i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, * ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, amis *%, paiwan *%, bunun *%, zumazuma **%. smaŇčus i ńßsin ¶ńßu a kuwan nu kar~…ĺinku ku nijazu Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus. u kasar~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu smaŇčus sa, ** ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ °. kumud nu kasabinawr~…ĺan sa, *** ku tad…ômawan. kasabinawr~…ĺan nu iŇč ¶umin sa, *** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu **%. u zuma sa, ¶aj ku iŇč ¶umin, ** ku tad…ômaw, pakar~…ĺatu *%. u kasabina ¶adan, tajar~…ĺ **%, sajsijat *%, zumazuma *%.
